task.label: Ensure that applicants undergo a medical examination

conditions.condition: before a driving licence is issued for the first time
before a driving licence is issued for the first time

task.label: Require medical examination for categories C, CE, C1, C1E, D, D1, DE or D1E

conditions.condition: application for driving licences of categories C, CE, C1, C1E, D, D1, DE or D1E

task.label: Undergo a medical examination for renewal

conditions.condition: before a driving licence is renewed

exception.description: for category AM, only if required by the Member State in question

task.label: Require applicant or holder to fill in a self-assessment form

conditions.condition: for categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE
instead of requiring a medical examination
if required by Member State
when applying for issuance or renewal of a driving licence

task.label: Establish a national system of assessment of fitness to drive

conditions.condition: for categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE
instead of requiring a medical examination
for knowingly providing false information in the self-assessment form, or for failing to meet any requirement established under point (b)

task.label: Apply alternative measure under point (b) allowing monitoring of fitness to drive

conditions.condition: during periods of administrative validity

task.label: Ensure that applicant or holder undergoes a medical examination

conditions.condition: if it becomes apparent that the applicant or holder is likely to have one or more medical conditions listed
on the basis of information acquired pursuant to alternative measures

task.label: Undergo a medical examination prior to issuance or renewal

conditions.condition: if it becomes apparent that the applicant or holder is likely to have one or more medical conditions listed
prior to issuing or renewing the driving licence

task.label: Take measures to raise awareness and improve knowledge
Inform the Commission of adopted guidelines

conditions.condition: if Member States adopt guidelines for medical practitioners to help identify driving licence holders who no longer meet the minimum standards

task.label: Make guidelines available to other Member States

conditions.condition: after being informed by Member States of adopted guidelines

task.label: Inform the Commission of public awareness campaigns

conditions.condition: if Member States develop public awareness campaigns about mental or physical health conditions that may impair fitness to drive

task.label: Make campaign information available to other Member States

conditions.condition: after being informed by Member States of public awareness campaigns

task.label: Set stricter standards for issuance or renewal
